title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Max Fashion

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Max Fashion
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!
